items.name: Olive and Almonds
items.description: BUTTERY-SWEET CASTELEVETRANO OLIVES & SMOKED BLUE DIAMOND ALMONDS *Contains pits

items.name: Charcuterie Board
items.description: CHEF'S DAILY SELECECTION OF 3 CURED MEATS & 3 ARTISAN CHEESES ACCOUTEMENTS AND FRESH BAKED BREAD. JUST CHEESE OR MEAT ALSO AVAILABLE!

items.name: Fhun Diip
items.description: CHEF CURATED DIP THAT CHANGES MONTHLY

items.name: Crab Cakes
items.description: Lump crab meat, mixed with panko, eggs, toasted chilies & herbs. Panko crusted and fried. Served with lemons & our picante dill pickle aioli

items.name: Soft Bavarian Pretzel
items.description: SERVED WARM WITH OUR SIGNATURE AUGUSTIJN ALE AIOLI BREWED BY BROUWERIJ VAN STEENBERGE IN BELGIUM

items.name: Belgian Mussels
items.description: 1 POUND STEAMED IN WHITE WINE, AROMATICS HERBS, & CREAM. SERVED WITH BUTTERED & GRILLED BAGUETTE

items.name: Steak Salad
items.description: Grilled beef tenderloin, organic mixed greens, peppadew peppers, shaved red onions, feta cheese. Dressed in our sun dried tomato vinaigrette

items.name: Pub Salad
items.description: Mixed organic greens dressed in our champagne vinaigrette and topped with our brioche croûtons. *Add chicken $6

items.name: Chicken Chip Chop Salad
items.description: Brined & grilled chicken breast, little gems & mixed greens, dressed in our Champagne vinaigrette. Topped with blistered cherry tomatoes, marinated green beans, hard boiled eggs, and morning made d'Espelette salted potato chips

items.name: Caeser Salad
items.description: Hearts of romaine tossed in our housemade Caesar dressing, and topped with Parmesan Cheese, and croutons. Add Grilled Salmon $12 or Grilled Chicken $6

items.name: Soup of The Day
items.description: Housemade soup, crafted every two days and served with crusty bread & butter. Ask your server for today's selection

items.name: Pommes Frites
items.description: Fresh cut Kennebec potatoes double fried with duck fat. Served with Heinz ketchup and our signature sauces, Horseradish Chive & Remoulade Ranch.

items.name: Soup and Pub Salad
items.description: Bowl of today's soup selection, served with our Pub salad and fresh baked bread & butter

items.name: The Back Abbey
items.description: Aged gouda, mustard aioli, caramelized onions, Niman Ranch Bacon & micro greens

items.name: Backyard Burger
items.description: SHREDDED ICEBURG LETTUCE, RED REMY SAUCE, RED ONIONS, ROMA TOMATOES, DILL PICKLES & AGED WHITE CHEDDAR. ADD BACON $2

items.name: The Lamb Burger
items.description: Ground Lamb, Arugula, Gouda Cheese, Pickled Red Onion, D'Espelette Aioli

items.name: Chicken Club
items.description: Grilled chicken breast, aged cheddar, tomatoes, pickled red onion, shredded lettuce, Niman Ranch Bacon, D'espelette aioli on Ciabatta Bread

items.name: Turkey Burger
items.description: Turkey Patty, Fig Jam, Feta Cheese, Frisee Lettuce

items.name: The Red Monk Burger
items.description: Cranberry Apple Chutney, Feta Cheese, Cranberry Mustard Aioli, Arugula

items.name: The Tenderloin
items.description: Grilled beef tenderloin, caramelized onions & St. Agur Crème Fraiche, served on a toasted French Roll

items.name: Biergarten Brat
items.description: Grilled Agrodolce peppers, caramelized onions, on a toasted French roll. Served with a side of our spicy apple mustard.

items.name: Spicy Chicken Schnitzel
items.description: Panko breaded, d'Espelette aioli, shredded iceberg lettuce & pickled Fresno chilies, served on a Brioche Bun *Also available as grilled chicken

items.name: The Grilled Garden
items.description: Grilled portobello mushrooms, eggplant, zucchini, feta cheese, agrodolce peppers & herb aioli, served on a Brioche bun *Vegan option is served on a toasted French roll without feta

items.name: The BLT
items.description: THICK CUT SMOKED PORK BELLY, TOMATOES, SHREDDED LETTUCE, PICKLED RED ONION, & GREEN REMEY. SERVED ON A PRETZEL ROLL AND A SIDE OF OUR D'ESPELETTE POTATO CHIPS. * ADD AVOCADO $3

items.name: Schnitzel
items.description: Breaded, pounded & fried pork loin, German style potato and bacon salad, Frisee lettuce, with caramelized onion vinaigrette

items.name: Bavik Battered Fish
items.description: Ling cod dipped in our Bavik beer battered. served along side frites and a small mixed salad dressed with our house dressing

items.name: Steak & Frites
items.description: 8 ounce prime flat iron steak topped with Maitre D' butter. Accompanied by pomme frites & an arugula salad with our caramelized onion vinaigrette

items.name: French Beignets
items.description: Belgian chocolate fudge with berries & Confectioners' sugar

items.name: Bavarian Dream Cake Cup
items.description: Chocolate cake, Bavarian Cream, Caramel, Chocolate
